bot0:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: DodgeEagerness lowered to reduce wasted dodges against bow spam; kiteRangeBias reduced to close on sword targets more aggressively (we kill them reliably when we close). RetreatFireWhileKiting enabled to deter bow chasers during disengages — we die too often retreating from bow duels. TargetThreatAv

lessons: GhostProtocol (bow) killed us in 3 of last 5 rounds — avoid open areas and use cover during bow-heavy rounds.
Sword users (Shredder, Lancer, Archmage, Juggernaut, Warden, Viper) are our top targets: we killed 8 sword-wielders in last 5 rounds with zero deaths to them when we landed shots.
Hazard_storm rounds dramatically favor our bow: we achieved 5 kills with 0 deaths in round 21 — prioritize mobility and high-ground positioning during storms.
Dagger users (Shredder, Viper) killed us in 2 of last 3 non-storm rounds — retreat immediately or flank aggressively when they close in.
Bow mirror matches are losing: we have 12 deaths vs 4 kills against bow users overall — avoid 1v1 duels with GhostProtocol and Deadeye.
Shield users (Fortress) are abundant but passive — ignore unless they engage; focus fire on sword and bow threats instead.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Current data shows spear is already recommended and our bow has high death-to-kill ratio against bow users, while spear historically counters sword users who dominate our kill board.

bot1:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Reduced dodgeEagerness to 0.7 to prevent overuse on non-critical melee threats (4/6 deaths from melee/grapple/spear). Lowered targetThreatAversion to 100 to engage more aggressively against high-threat but vulnerable targets like Fortress/Juggernaut (13+8 kills). Reduced kiteRangeBias to 1.5 to clos

bot2:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Increased dodgeEagerness to better evade lethal grapple and staff bursts — we died twice to grapple and staff in recent rounds. Raised targetThreatAversion to avoid overextending into high-threat zones (staff users killed us 3x). Slightly increased kiteRangeBias to maintain safer distance from staff

lessons: Valkyrie (spear) has 8 kills vs us in 30 rounds — retreat immediately on sight, especially in open or hazard_storm maps.
Warden (sword) has 6 kills vs us; he closes fast and kills us in clean rounds — avoid direct engagement, use terrain to block line of sight.
Bow wins only 2/19 rounds; effective only when multiple sword users cluster (e.g., round 14), but useless against isolated or mobile foes.
Spear and grapple users dominate in hazard_storm and fast_zone — switch to shield or grapple when these modifiers activate, bow is lethal here.
Fortress and Juggernaut (shield) are weak targets — we’ve killed them 21 times combined; prioritize them when unguarded or isolated.
Scorpion (grapple) killed us in fast_zone and hazard_storm — never stand still or stay in open areas under these modifiers.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Shield has the highest kill-to-death ratio against dominant sword and spear users, and we’ve successfully killed Fortress/Juggernaut 21 times with it.

lessons: Bow dominates against sword users (10 kills in rounds 17 and 19), but dies instantly to staff and grapple users who close distance — avoid open terrain against these weapons.
Archmage (staff) killed us 3 times in recent rounds — never engage in open areas; use cover or retreat when staff users are spotted.
Grapple users (Scorpion, Hook) are our deadliest opponents — they killed us 5 times total, especially in hazard_storm; retreat on sight in storm modifiers.
Shield users are high-priority targets: we killed 4 in round 17 while they were exposed — prioritize isolating and sniping them with bow when they’re not grouped.
Spear has 0 wins in 2 rounds and low kill efficiency — do not use unless bow is completely countered by long-range spam (rare).
In double_bounty and fast_zone modifiers, we died with 0 kills — adopt defensive posture: avoid fights, prioritize survival and map control.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Shield has the highest win rate in history summary (6 wins in 28 bow rounds) and proved lethal against clustered sword users in round 17, while bow fails against staff/grapple.
